findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy header
findings.evidence: Content-Security-Policy header was not present in the response.
findings.recommendation: Define a Content-Security-Policy header to reduce XSS impact.

findings.title: Missing Referrer-Policy header
findings.evidence: Referrer-Policy header was not present in the response.
findings.recommendation: Set a Referrer-Policy header to reduce referrer leakage.

findings.title: Missing Permissions-Policy header
findings.evidence: Permissions-Policy header was not present in the response.
findings.recommendation: Set a Permissions-Policy header to restrict browser feature access.
